dna.federation.queryAudits.entity.title: Query Audit
dna.federation.queryAudits.entity.descri: Audit record of federation-query execution summaries and result sizes.
dna.federation.queryAudits.description.c: Federation catalog code hit by the query
dna.federation.queryAudits.description.v: Logical view code hit by the query
dna.federation.queryAudits.description.s: Execution result status of the query
dna.federation.queryAudits.description.e: Actual execution time of the query
dna.federation.queryAudits.description.r: Total number of rows returned by the query
dna.federation.queryAudits.description.e: User identity that submitted the query
dna.federation.queryAudits.description.q: SQL text executed by the federation query
dna.federation.queryAudits.description.p: Summary of predicates, projections, or pagination pushed down to source databases
dna.federation.queryAudits.description.e: Error summary recorded when execution fails
